reviews.comment:
Un desastre. Tardan horas en atender aun cuando no hay nadie. Son unos ladrones de gallinas. Me cobraron $1440 UN foco trasero cuando a la tarde pasé por una axion y me cobraron $440 por DOS focos.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. They take hours to serve you even when there's no one there. They're a bunch of rip-off artists. They charged me $1440 for ONE taillight when I went to an Axion earlier that afternoon and they charged me $440 for TWO.

reviews.comment:
Sugiero NO ir a Boxes para Cambio Aceite y Filtros. El jueves 16-02-2023 a las 14 Hs llevé mí Auto a hacer Cambio de Aceite y Filtros. Pedí Turno por la App YPF. Realmente pocas veces me crucé con una persona que me tiene que dar un servicio, tan altanero y con semejante nivel de soberbia. Pretendió que le dejara mi Auto y se negó a darme la explicación pertinente respecto al Combustible y los Filtros que iba a usar. Quise presenciar el cambio de aceite y me lo impidió de manera autoritaria. Obviamente ante este atropello, me retiré sin permitir que me hiciera absolutamente nada. Me parece imprescindible que YPF y ACA pongan coto al proceder de este hombre Rubén (según figura en un Presupuesto que después de mucho insistir se dignó a dármelo).

(Translated by Google)
I suggest NOT going to the service center for an oil and filter change. On Thursday, February 16, 2023, at 2 PM, I took my car in for an oil and filter change. I made an appointment through the YPF app. I have rarely encountered someone so arrogant and condescending while providing service. He demanded I leave my car with him and refused to explain the fuel and filters he would be using. I wanted to watch the oil change, but he authoritatively prevented me from doing so. Obviously, faced with this abuse of power, I left without allowing him to do anything to my car. I believe it is essential that YPF and ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) put a stop to this man Rubén's behavior (as stated in an estimate he finally deigned to give me after much insistence).

reviewReply.comment: Le pedimos mil disculpas y sera elevado al sector de boxes gracias

reviews.comment:
Como socio del acá es un orgullo las instalaciones que tiene el edificio. En cuanto a la atención en la estación de servicio de nafta, es muy dispar, generalmente hay cola y no siempre habilitan todos los surtidores. Aire ponete solito y lavate los dedos donde puedas. Para la espera el café y las facturas de la cafetería son impecables.

(Translated by Google)
As a member of this club, I'm proud of the building's facilities. However, the service at the gas station is inconsistent; there's usually a line, and not all the pumps are always open. You're better off getting air by yourself and washing your fingers wherever you can. While you wait, the coffee and pastries at the café are excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocGI2aXB3RRAB
